title: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch Isn't Lying: My Top 3 Reasons Why
summary: Jesse Michels presents his top three reasons for believing UFO whistleblower David Grusch is telling the truth about UFO reverse engineering programs, citing the Inspector General's credible finding, Lockheed Martin's non-denial, and connections to Oppenheimer-era secrecy protocols.

acronyms.definition: Alternative term for UFOs used by government and military

events.description: David Grusch testified before Congress about UFO reverse engineering programs

key_claims.claim: David Grusch brought 40 other people who handled UFO material directly to the Inspector General
The Inspector General labeled Grusch's complaint urgent and credible
On Joe Rogan, Grusch identified Lockheed Martin as one of the contractors in possession of UFO material
After Grusch's hearing, Lockheed Martin did not deny possession of UFOs but said questions about UAPs are best handled by the government
Robert J Oppenheimer set up UFO secrecy protocols in the 1950s protected by the same protocols that hide American nuclear secrets
